case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC VS. NE V NGUYEN

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, NE V SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-08-2013
DECLARATION RE; REDUCTION IN FILING FEE PURSUANT TO BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 6322.1 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, NE V
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $246.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, NE V

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, NE V $2,424.93 PRINCIPAL, $458.70 INTEREST, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,129.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC SERVED JUL-25-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, NE V

EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: HARRIS, STELIOS A. SUBSTITUTED FOR MERRILL, ANN K. AS ATTORNEY FOR ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
